representatives.name: Mr Antonio Tsui
representatives.role: instructed by Huen & Cheung, assigned by DLA, for the accused in HCCC 316/2023

representatives.name: Ms Tso Yin-chee Denise
representatives.role: instructed by K Y Woo & Co LLP, assigned by DLA, for the 1st accused in HCCC 317/2023

representatives.name: Miss Emily Cheung
representatives.role: instructed by Wong & Tang, assigned by DLA, for the 2nd accused in HCCC 317/2023

charges.charge_name: Conspiracy to traffic in a dangerous drug

offence_date.source: So has pleaded guilty to conspiracy to traffic in a dangerous drug, namely, cocaine with Fu, the defendant of 316/2023, and other persons unknown, between two dates, 1 and 2 October 2021 in Hong Kong.

cross_border.source: So has pleaded guilty to conspiracy to traffic in a dangerous drug, namely, cocaine with Fu, the defendant of 316/2023, and other persons unknown, between two dates, 1 and 2 October 2021 in Hong Kong.

trafficking_mode.source: She was added to a WhatsApp group and received instructions through this group. She would receive phone calls or messages from drug suppliers to tell her where to pick up the drugs.

roles_facts.source: Under caution at the scene, So admitted delivering drugs for money.

reasons_for_offence.source: This friends mother offered her a job to make easy money, delivering drugs as instructed for $1,000 a day.

benefits_received.source: She also had HK$14,840 in cash.

charges.charge_name: Conspiracy to traffic in dangerous drugs

offence_date.source: Lam has pleaded guilty to conspiracy to traffic in a dangerous drug, namely, cocaine and cannabis in a herbal form with Fu, the defendant of 316/2023, and other persons unknown between 22 September and 3 October 2021, both dates inclusive, in Hong Kong.

cross_border.source: Lam has pleaded guilty to conspiracy to traffic in a dangerous drug, namely, cocaine and cannabis in a herbal form with Fu, the defendant of 316/2023, and other persons unknown between 22 September and 3 October 2021, both dates inclusive, in Hong Kong.

trafficking_mode.source: then he was to take it back to the subdivided unit in Mongkok and repackage the drugs into smaller bags.

roles_facts.source: then he was to take it back to the subdivided unit in Mongkok and repackage the drugs into smaller bags.

After his arrest, Fu revealed a drug storage premises in Mongkok to the police. ... An estate agent acting for the landlord of that subdivided unit confirmed that Fu and Lam both signed the tenancy agreement.

reasons_for_offence.source: He told the police that both he and Fu met this Siu Wan who offered them both a way to make easy money.

benefits_received.non_monetary_benefits: Siu Wan provided money to buy digital scales and plastic bags
benefits_received.source: He instructed them to rent the subdivided unit and provided money to buy digital scales and plastic bags.

charges.charge_name: Conspiracy to traffic in a dangerous drug

offence_date.source: Fu now pleads guilty to conspiracy to traffic in a dangerous drug, namely, cocaine with So and Lam and other persons unknown between 1 and 2 October 2021 in Hong Kong.

cross_border.source: Fu now pleads guilty to conspiracy to traffic in a dangerous drug, namely, cocaine with So and Lam and other persons unknown between 1 and 2 October 2021 in Hong Kong.

trafficking_mode.source: Earlier that day or the day before on 1 October she received two messages in the afternoon from one such supplier. The defendant, Fu, instructed her to meet him at 59 Prince Edward Road West where he was to replenish her drug supply for her to make further deliveries to customers.
After his arrest, Fu revealed a drug storage premises in Mongkok to the police. They searched the premises and found 41 plastic bags containing a total of 7.2 grammes...

roles_facts.source: Apart from messages with So, the police found a WhatsApp group in Fus mobile showing members of the WhatsApp group sending out instructions of customers, their drug order, the price to pay and location of delivery.

reasons_for_offence.source: I have received a letter from this defendant expressing genuine remorse and regret for being greedy, foolish, led astray and disappointing his parents.

benefits_received.source: It would appear that he had made deliveries as well. His first message appears on this WhatsApp group on 1 October 2021, two days before his arrest.

offence_date.source: Fu now pleads guilty to trafficking in dangerous drugs on 3 October 2021 in Room F, 3rd Floor, 59 Prince Edward Road West, Mongkok, Hong Kong, he unlawfully trafficked in 7.2 grammes of a solid containing 6.19 grammes of cocaine and 6.12 grammes of cannabis in herbal form.

place_of_offence.address: Room F, 3rd Floor, 59 Prince Edward Road West, Mongkok, Hong Kong
place_of_offence.source: Fu now pleads guilty to trafficking in dangerous drugs on 3 October 2021 in Room F, 3rd Floor, 59 Prince Edward Road West, Mongkok, Hong Kong, he unlawfully trafficked in 7.2 grammes of a solid containing 6.19 grammes of cocaine and 6.12 grammes of cannabis in herbal form.

cross_border.source: Fu now pleads guilty to trafficking in dangerous drugs on 3 October 2021 in Room F, 3rd Floor, 59 Prince Edward Road West, Mongkok, Hong Kong, he unlawfully trafficked in 7.2 grammes of a solid containing 6.19 grammes of cocaine and 6.12 grammes of cannabis in herbal form.

trafficking_mode.source: They searched the premises and found 41 plastic bags containing a total of 7.2 grammes of a solid containing 6.19 grammes of cocaine and two plastic bags containing a total of 6.12 grammes of cannabis in herbal form.

roles_facts.source: After his arrest, Fu revealed a drug storage premises in Mongkok to the police. The police obtained a search warrant and visited that location. They used keys found on Fu to gain access to the premises.

reasons_for_offence.source: I have received a letter from this defendant expressing genuine remorse and regret for being greedy, foolish, led astray and disappointing his parents.

benefits_received.source: There is no explicit reference to Fu receiving payments or proceeds of trafficking in the judgment extract.
